scenario_label: Single real MiroMind call — fact-checking one citation from an AI-written NVIDIA note.
input_text:
Vendor equity research note — NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA), May 2026.

NVIDIA closed fiscal 2025 with $152 billion in total revenue.

According to Morgan Stanley's report "The Trillion-Dollar Accelerator: NVIDIA's Moat Through 2030" (Lee & Ramaswamy, March 2025), NVIDIA will retain more than 80% of the data-center GPU market through 2027.

Gartner expects AI accelerators deployed in servers to reach $150 billion by 2028.

claims.text: According to Morgan Stanley's report "The Trillion-Dollar Accelerator: NVIDIA's Moat Through 2030" (Lee & Ramaswamy, March 2025), NVIDIA will retain more than 80% of the data-center GPU market through 2027.

findings.summary: Answer The specific Morgan Stanley report described in the claim does not appear to exist in any publicly accessible source. What was checked I searched for multiple combinations of the alleged title, authors, and details: 1. Exact report title and variants - Queries: - "The Tr-Dollar Accelerator: NVIDIA's Moat Through 2030" Stanley Lee Ramaswamy March 2025 - "The Trillion-Dollar Accelerator: NVIDIA's Moat Through 0"
findings.why_wrong: Searches across the title, authors, and Morgan Stanley's own coverage found no such report — the citation appears fabricated.
